message.content:
### Detailed Description of the Webpage Section  

#### 1. Background Color  
The background is a **light, neutral beige/cream** (off-white) color, creating a clean, minimalist aesthetic.  


#### 2. Tool Cards Visible  
No tool cards (e.g., VAT Calculator, Image Resizer, Color Palette, etc.) are visible in this section.  


#### 3. Section Labels (Mono-Spaced Text)  
- **TRUST & PROOF** (centered, above the "Built in Kenya..." heading)  
- **MODULE-06** (smaller, centered, below "TRUST & PROOF")  
- **COMMAND: INITIATE** (centered, above the "Ready to Build..." heading)  


#### 4. Section Headings (Verbatim)  
- **Al-Powered** (top-left, bold)  
- **Free AI features for non-designers** (subheading, below "Al-Powered")  
- **Utilities** (below "Al-Powered" section)  
- **Quick everyday helpers** (subheading, below "Utilities")  
- **Built in Kenya. Serving the World.** (centered, bold)  
- **Ready to Build a Business That Runs Even When You're Abroad?** (centered, bold, below "COMMAND: INITIATE")  


#### 5. Button Colors  
- **START A PROJECT** button: Bright orange (with white text and an arrow icon)  
- **STRATEGY CALL** button: White (with orange text, no icon)  


#### 6. Testimonials/Reviews  
No testimonials or reviews are visible in this section.  


#### 7. Footer Content  
The footer is divided into three columns:  
- **Left Column**:  
  - Logo (stylized "Creative" text)  
  - Tagline: *"Design, Build & Scale Businesses From Anywhere. Your partner in business architecture & growth."*  
- **Middle Column (SERVICES)**:  
  - "SERVICES" (heading)  
  - List: Branding, Web Design, T-Shirt Printing, DTF / DTG Printing, Marketing  
- **Middle Column (TOOLS)**:  
  - "TOOLS" (heading)  
  - List: All Tools, Canvas Designer, Image Clipper, Mockup Generator, Effects Studio  
- **Right Column (CONTACT)**:  
  - "CONTACT" (heading)  
  - List:  
    - Email: info@creativedivineconcepts.com  
    - Phone: +254 711 669 113  
    - WhatsApp Support  
    - Address: Githunguri Ndumberi, Kiambu, Kenya  
    - Social icons (Twitter, LinkedIn)  
- **Bottom Footer**:  
  - Copyright: *"© 2026 Creative Divine Concepts Ltd. All rights reserved."*  
  - Tagline: *"Built in Kenya. Serving the World."*  


#### 8. Visible Bugs, Broken Layouts, or Text Overflow  
No bugs, broken layouts, or text overflow are visible. The layout is clean and well-structured.  


#### 9. Overall Design Quality  
The design is **minimalist, professional, and cohesive** with a neutral color palette (beige background, orange accents). Typography is clear and hierarchical, and the layout is organized (sections, footer columns) for easy navigation. The use of mono-spaced labels (e.g., "COMMAND: INITIATE") adds a tech-inspired touch, while the footer provides comprehensive contact and service information. The design effectively balances simplicity with functionality.  


### All Headings and Labels (Verbatim)  
- Al-Powered  
- Free AI features for non-designers  
- Utilities  
- Quick everyday helpers  
- TRUST & PROOF  
- MODULE-06  
- Built in Kenya. Serving the World.  
- COMMAND: INITIATE  
- Ready to Build a Business That Runs Even When You're Abroad?  
- SERVICES  
- TOOLS  
- CONTACT  
- START A PROJECT  
- STRATEGY CALL
